name: campus-treehole-tooling
description: CloudBase CLI：将 cloudbaserc.json 中的环境变量同步到云端（与小程序 npm 无关）

scripts.cloud:push-fn-env: node -e "const{spawn}=require('child_process');function run(n,c){return new Promise((res,rej)=>{const p=spawn('npx',['-p','@cloudbase/cli@latest','tcb','config','update','fn',n],{stdio:['pipe','inherit','inherit'],shell:true,cwd:__dirname});p.stdin.write('\r\n');p.on('close',c=>c===0?res():rej(new Error('exit '+c)));});} (async()=>{await run('adminPanel');await run('dbOperations');})();"
scripts.cloud:login-list: npx -p @cloudbase/cli@latest tcb env login list -e xyblh-5gb26qrnf9d30feb
scripts.cloud:login-add-anonymous: npx -p @cloudbase/cli@latest tcb env login create -e xyblh-5gb26qrnf9d30feb
scripts.cloud:login-update: npx -p @cloudbase/cli@latest tcb env login update -e xyblh-5gb26qrnf9d30feb
